response.overview: Forty Years of Collaboration in Design: The Life and Work of the Campana Brothers  A film produced in 2024 to celebrate the fortieth anniversary of the founding of Estúdio Campana.  We The Others presents the life and work of Fernando and Humberto Campana, a celebrated Brazilian design duo known as major innovators in today's creative landscape . Over the past forty years, the two brothers have not only left an indelible mark on the design world, but have also been actively involved in various social initiatives. Their pioneering approach to art and design makes them unique in the field. The idea of ​​making a documentary that spans their work from their beginnings in 1984 to the present day was born as a celebration of the studio's fortieth anniversary.
response.title: We The Others
